items.titolo: I thought ChatGPT's voice mode was a gimmick - these 7 use cases changed my mind
items.descrizione: Voice Mode fabricated answers the last time I used it, but a revisit revealed that it's actually useful now.

items.titolo: Microsoft Edge 146: novità per sicurezza e Copilot
items.descrizione: Microsoft Edge 146 include diverse novità che riguardano produttività, sicurezza, privacy, ricerca e Copilot, oltre alle patch per due vulnerabilità. The post Microsoft Edge 146: novità per sicurezza e Copilot appeared f

items.titolo: Google Is Not Ruling Out Ads in Gemini
items.descrizione: WIRED spoke with Nick Fox, Google’s SVP of knowledge and information, about how AI is changing the company’s advertising business.

items.titolo: Palantir Demos Show How the Military Could Use AI Chatbots to Generate War Plans
items.descrizione: Software demos and Pentagon records detail how chatbots like Anthropic’s Claude could help the Pentagon analyze intelligence and suggest next steps.
